iteration_1_baseline.notes: city-distance: API-level flake — 0 tokens, no model response (not a skill issue)

iteration_2_optimized.notes: Both tasks perfect after skill optimization

iteration_3_confirmation.notes: city-distance: API-level flake again — 0 tokens, 1s runtime

iteration_4_confirmation.notes: Both tasks perfect — confirms optimization is stable

changes: Removed Python implementation (opencode uses TypeScript only)
Added explicit closestPairs helper function with city1/city2/distance_km output format
Added nearestPoint function returning index and distance
Streamlined distance matrix to use symmetric optimization (j = i+1)
Added Key Rules section with JSON output guidance (JSON.stringify, fs.writeFileSync)
Reduced token count by ~30% while preserving all critical formulas
notes: Two of four runs had city-distance score 0 due to API-level flakes (deepseek-v3.2 returning empty responses with 0 tokens). When the model responds, both tasks consistently score 100/100.
